---
title: "Enhancing cementoenamel junction (CEJ) imaging using gold nanorods in optical coherence tomography (OCT)"
date: 2025-11-10
author:
  - name: Da Silva, Carolina Pereira
  - name: De Lima, Maria Heloísa Da Conceição Tavares
  - name: Da Silva Júnior, Manoel Bernardo
  - name: Cavalcanti, Marcela Rosa Nogueira
  - name: De Andrade, Audrey Nunes
  - name: Das, Avishek
  - name: Pramanik, Manojit
  - name: Da Silva, Daniela De Fátima Teixeira
  - name: Zezell, Denise Maria
  - name: Gomes, Anderson Stevens Leônidas
  - name: Lopes, Daniela Siqueira
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Lasers in Medical Science"
  volume: 40
  issue: 1
  doi: "10.1007/s10103-025-04735-x"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Enhancing cementoenamel junction (CEJ) imaging using gold nanorods in optical coherence tomography (OCT)</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
